original_image_tags: A scan of the back or front of a single, aged document page. The page is mostly blank with significant "ghosting" or faint text visible through the paper, suggesting it is a carbon copy or the ink from the other side is showing through. Two dark hole-punch marks are visible at the top edge. The primary, legible markings are stamps and a handwritten note at the very bottom. The paper shows age-related discoloration and spotting.

elements.description: Red stamp: '2 XEROX COPIES DATE 11-29-66'. Blue inverted stamp: 'NOV 29 9 32 AM '66 FBI REC'D-CURR & TOURO'. A faint, illegible red stamp is visible in the bottom left corner.

judge.reason: Both agree on the primary visual elements (hole-punches, stamps at the bottom), but Description B adds specific quoted stamp text that Description A omits without contradiction.
